101.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was lying with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in his bed and slipped away. He asked: "Are you menstruating?" She said: "Yes." He said: "Tie on your lower garment and come back."
101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berbaring bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di tempat tidurnya dan menyelinap pergi. Beliau bertanya: "Apakah kamu haid?" Ia berkata: "Ya." Beliau bersabda: "Ikat kain bawahmu dan kembalilah."

102.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), the Mother of the Believers, that she said: "I asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about the easy reckoning and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, what is the easy reckoning?' He said: 'A man whose sins are presented to him and then he is pardoned for them. Whoever is questioned closely in the reckoning will perish. And no servant is pricked by a thorn or anything greater except that Allah the Almighty makes it an atonement for his sins.'"
102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), Ummul Mukminin, bahwa ia berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang hisab yang mudah dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apa itu hisab yang mudah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Seorang laki-laki yang dosa-dosanya diperlihatkan kepadanya kemudian ia diampuni dari dosa-dosa itu. Barangsiapa diperiksa secara detail dalam hisab, ia akan binasa. Dan tidak ada seorang hamba pun yang tertusuk duri atau sesuatu yang lebih dari itu kecuali Allah Yang Maha Mulia menjadikannya penebus dosa-dosanya.'"

103.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, then he would send them and remain without abstaining from anything."
103.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa menganyam kalung-kalung hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ, kemudian beliau mengirimkannya dan tetap tidak menahan diri dari apapun."

104.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the verse of choice was revealed, the Prophet ﷺ offered her the choice between this world and Allah. She said: "Shall I consult my parents? Rather I choose Allah, His Messenger ﷺ, and the Hereafter." The Prophet ﷺ was pleased and delighted with this. He then said: "I will offer the same to your companions." She asked him not to tell them what she had chosen. He did not, but after each of them chose, he would say: "Aisha has already made her choice."
104.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ayat pilihan diturunkan, Nabi ﷺ menawarkan kepadanya pilihan antara dunia dan Allah. Ia berkata: "Haruskah aku berkonsultasi dengan orang tuaku? Justru aku memilih Allah, Rasul-Nya ﷺ, dan Akhirat." Nabi ﷺ merasa senang dan gembira dengan ini. Beliau kemudian berkata: "Aku akan menawarkan hal yang sama kepada sahabat-sahabatmu." Ia memintanya untuk tidak memberitahukan apa yang ia pilih. Beliau tidak melakukannya, tetapi setelah masing-masing dari mereka memilih, beliau berkata: "Aisyah telah membuat pilihannya."

105.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that on the day of departure from Mina, she was mentioned as possibly detaining the group. The Prophet ﷺ said: "Perhaps she will detain us." But when told she had already performed the tawaf of the House, he said: "Then let her set out."
105.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada hari keberangkatan dari Mina, ia disebut mungkin akan menahan rombongan. Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Mungkin ia akan menahan kami." Tetapi ketika diberitahu bahwa ia sudah melakukan tawaf Baitullah, beliau bersabda: "Maka biarlah ia berangkat."

106.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ left behind no dinar, no dirham, no female slave, no male slave, no sheep, and no camel."
106.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak meninggalkan dinar, tidak dirham, tidak budak perempuan, tidak budak laki-laki, tidak domba, dan tidak unta."

107.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when a woman asked her whether a menstruating woman needs to make up her prayers, she said: "Are you a Haruriyyah? The women of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to menstruate. Did he command them to make up their prayers?"
107.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika seorang wanita bertanya apakah wanita yang haid perlu mengqadha shalatnya, ia berkata: "Apakah kamu seorang Haruriyyah? Para wanita Rasulullah ﷺ dulu haid. Apakah beliau memerintahkan mereka untuk mengqadha shalat mereka?"

108.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "When 'Amr ibn Umm Maktum gives the adhan, eat and drink, for he is a man who cannot see. But when Bilal gives the adhan, stop eating, for Bilal does not give the adhan until dawn has broken."
108.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Ketika Amr bin Ummu Maktum mengumandangkan adzan, makan dan minumlah, karena ia adalah laki-laki yang tidak bisa melihat. Tetapi ketika Bilal mengumandangkan adzan, berhentilah makan, karena Bilal tidak mengumandangkan adzan hingga fajar telah terbit."

109.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "It is as if I can see the glistening of perfume in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ days later, and he was in the state of ihram."
109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seolah-olah aku dapat melihat kilap wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ beberapa hari kemudian, dan beliau dalam keadaan ihram."

110.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I perfumed the Prophet ﷺ with a perfume that contained musk when he entered ihram before becoming muhrim, and on the Day of Sacrifice before he performed the tawaf of the House."
110.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku memakaikan wewangian kepada Nabi ﷺ dengan wewangian yang mengandung minyak kesturi ketika beliau memasuki ihram sebelum menjadi muhrim, dan pada Hari Nahr sebelum beliau melakukan tawaf Baitullah."

111.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to perfume the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for his ihram when he entered it, and when he exited ihram before performing the tawaf of the House."
111.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa memakaikan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ﷺ untuk ihramnya ketika beliau memasukinya, dan ketika beliau keluar dari ihram sebelum melakukan tawaf Baitullah."

112.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "I used to perfume the Messenger of Allah ﷺ when he exited ihram and when he entered ihram."
112.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Aku biasa memakaikan wewangian kepada Rasulullah ﷺ ketika beliau keluar dari ihram dan ketika beliau masuk ke dalam ihram."

113.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "It is as if I can see the glistening of perfume in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while he was in the state of ihram."
113.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seolah-olah aku dapat melihat kilap wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ sementara beliau dalam keadaan ihram."

114.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "It is as if I can see the glistening of perfume in the parting of the hair of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ days later while he was in the state of ihram."
114.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Seolah-olah aku dapat melihat kilap wewangian di belahan rambut Rasulullah ﷺ beberapa hari kemudian sementara beliau dalam keadaan ihram."

115.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray the two rak'ahs before Fajr so briefly that I would doubt whether he recited al-Fatihah in them or not."
115.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dua rakaat sebelum Subuh dengan sangat singkat sehingga aku meragukan apakah beliau membaca al-Fatihah di dalamnya atau tidak."

116.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: "Why do you not take a kunya?" She said: "By whom?" He said: "Take the kunya from your son 'Abdullah," meaning Ibn al-Zubayr. So she used to be called Umm 'Abdullah.
116.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: "Mengapa kamu tidak mengambil kunya?" Ia berkata: "Dari siapa?" Beliau bersabda: "Ambillah kunya dari anakmu Abdullah," yaitu Ibnu al-Zubayr. Maka ia biasa disebut Ummu Abdullah.

117.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, all your wives have a kunya except me." He said: "You are Umm 'Abdullah."
117.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, semua istrimu memiliki kunya kecuali aku." Beliau bersabda: "Engkau adalah Ummu Abdullah."

118.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the verses on riba were revealed, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ stood on the pulpit and recited them to the people, then forbade trade in wine."
118.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika ayat-ayat tentang riba diturunkan, Rasulullah ﷺ berdiri di atas mimbar dan membacakannya kepada orang-orang, kemudian mengharamkan perdagangan khamr."

119.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "Wala belongs to the one who gave the silver coin and emancipated and is the patron of the blessing." Barirah's husband was a free man, and she was given the choice.
119.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Wala adalah milik orang yang memberikan keping perak dan memerdekakan dan menjadi pelindung nikmat." Suami Barirah adalah laki-laki merdeka, dan ia diberi pilihan.

120.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she watched some performers over the shoulder of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. Abu Bakr came and the Prophet ﷺ said: "Leave her, for every people has their celebration, and this is our celebration."
120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyaksikan beberapa pemain dari bahu Rasulullah ﷺ. Abu Bakar datang dan Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Biarkan dia, karena setiap kaum memiliki perayaannya, dan ini adalah perayaan kita."

121.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the verse "Warn your nearest relatives" was revealed, the Prophet ﷺ stood and said: "O Fatimah, daughter of Muhammad! O Safiyyah, daughter of 'Abd al-Muttalib! O children of 'Abd al-Muttalib! I cannot avail you anything against Allah. Ask me from my wealth what you wish."
121.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ayat 'Berilah peringatan kepada kerabat-kerabatmu yang terdekat' diturunkan, Nabi ﷺ berdiri dan bersabda: "Wahai Fatimah, putri Muhammad! Wahai Shafiyyah, putri Abdul Muthalib! Wahai anak-anak Abdul Muthalib! Aku tidak dapat memberikan manfaat apa pun kepada kalian dari Allah. Mintalah kepadaku dari hartaku apa yang kalian inginkan."

122.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, I have two neighbors — to which one should I give a gift?" He said: "To the one whose door is closest to you."
122.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, aku memiliki dua tetangga — kepada yang mana aku harus memberi hadiah?" Beliau bersabda: "Kepada yang pintunya paling dekat denganmu."

123.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: "A man may attain through good character the rank of one who fasts and prays at night."
123.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: "Seorang laki-laki dapat mencapai melalui akhlak yang baik derajat orang yang berpuasa dan shalat malam."

124.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ left behind no dinar, no dirham, no sheep and no camel."
124.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ tidak meninggalkan dinar, tidak dirham, tidak domba, dan tidak unta."

125.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Jibril continued to urge me to treat neighbors well until I thought he would make them heirs.'"
125.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Jibril terus menerus mewasiatkan kepadaku untuk berbuat baik kepada tetangga, hingga aku mengira bahwa ia akan menjadikan mereka pewaris.'"

126.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The family of Muhammad ﷺ never had their fill of leavened bread for three consecutive days until he met Allah the Almighty."
126.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Keluarga Muhammad ﷺ tidak pernah kenyang dengan roti beragi selama tiga hari berturut-turut hingga beliau menemui Allah Yang Maha Mulia."

127.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, shall we not build you a house or a shelter in Mina to shade you from the sun?" He said: "No. Mina is just a resting place for whoever arrives there first."
127.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, tidakkah kita membangun rumah atau tempat berlindung untukmu di Mina untuk melindungimu dari matahari?" Beliau bersabda: "Tidak. Mina hanyalah tempat istirahat bagi siapapun yang tiba di sana lebih dahulu."

128.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Prophet ﷺ used to wrap me close to him and touch my head while I was menstruating."
128.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Nabi ﷺ biasa merangkulku ke dekatnya dan menyentuh kepalaku sementara aku sedang haid."

129.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "We were with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and one of us would menstruate and then become pure. He did not command us to make up the prayers, and we did not make them up."
129.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Kami bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dan salah satu dari kami akan haid kemudian suci. Beliau tidak memerintahkan kami untuk mengqadha shalat, dan kami tidak mengqadhanya."

130.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Umm Habib complained to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about irregular bleeding that had lasted seven years and asked for a ruling. He said: "This is not menstruation but a vein, so bathe and pray." She used to bathe before every prayer and pray, and would sit in a basin as the red of blood rose up through the water.
130.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Ummu Habib mengadu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang pendarahan tidak teratur yang telah berlangsung tujuh tahun dan meminta fatwa. Beliau bersabda: "Ini bukan haid tetapi suatu pembuluh, maka mandilah dan shalatlah." Ia biasa mandi sebelum setiap shalat dan shalat, dan duduk dalam baskom sementara warna merah darah naik melalui air.

131.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved to begin from the right side in all his affairs — in combing his hair, in purification, and in putting on his sandals.
131.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ suka memulai dari sisi kanan dalam semua urusannya — dalam menyisir rambutnya, dalam bersuci, dan dalam memakai sandal.

132.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ missed the two rak'ahs after Dhuhr, being occupied until after 'Asr. When he was done, he prayed those two rak'ahs in her house and never left them until he died. 'Abd Allah ibn Abi Qays said: "I asked Abu Hurayrah about it and he said: 'We used to do it, then we stopped.'"
132.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewatkan dua rakaat setelah Dzuhur, disibukkan hingga setelah Ashar. Ketika selesai, beliau shalat dua rakaat itu di rumahnya dan tidak pernah meninggalkannya hingga beliau wafat. Abdullah bin Abi Qays berkata: "Aku bertanya kepada Abu Hurairah tentang itu dan ia berkata: 'Kami biasa melakukannya, kemudian kami berhenti.'"

133.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Whatever you find in it of the lawful, consider it lawful; and whatever you find of the unlawful, consider it forbidden." When asked about the character of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ she said: "The Quran."
133.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Apa pun yang kamu temukan di dalamnya yang halal, anggaplah halal; dan apa pun yang kamu temukan yang haram, anggaplah haram." Ketika ditanya tentang akhlak Rasulullah ﷺ, ia berkata: "Al-Quran."

134.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The month most beloved to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ to fast was Sha'ban, and he would connect it to Ramadan."
134.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Bulan yang paling dicintai Rasulullah ﷺ untuk berpuasa adalah Sya'ban, dan beliau menyambungkannya dengan Ramadan."

135.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: "O Aisha, a house without dates — its people are hungry."
135.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: "Wahai Aisyah, rumah yang tidak ada kurmanya — penghuninya kelaparan."

136.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say: 'O Allah, make me among those who, when they do good, rejoice, and when they do evil, seek forgiveness.'"
136.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ biasa berdoa: 'Ya Allah, jadikan aku termasuk orang-orang yang ketika berbuat baik mereka bersuka cita, dan ketika berbuat buruk mereka mencari ampunan.'"

137.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ instructed a woman on how to perform ghusl from menstruation — to pour water over her head, massage to the roots of the hair, then pour more water and take a piece of cotton with musk to purify herself. When the woman asked how to use it, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was modest in his wording, and Aisha clarified: "Follow with it the traces of the blood."
137.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memberikan petunjuk kepada seorang wanita tentang cara mandi dari haid — menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya, memijat hingga akar-akar rambut, kemudian menuangkan air lagi dan mengambil kapas yang diolesi dengan minyak kesturi untuk bersuci. Ketika wanita itu bertanya bagaimana cara menggunakannya, Rasulullah ﷺ menggunakan kata-kata yang sopan, dan Aisyah menjelaskan: "Ikuti dengannya bekas-bekas darah."

138.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked how to perform ghusl, she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would perform ablution as for prayer, then pour water over his head three times. As for us, we pour over our heads five times on account of our braided hair."
138.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya cara melakukan ghusl, ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ berwudhu seperti wudhu untuk shalat, kemudian menuangkan air ke atas kepalanya tiga kali. Adapun kami, kami menuangkan di atas kepala kami lima kali karena rambut kami yang dikepang."

139.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered the house, he would begin with using the miswak."
139.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ memasuki rumah, beliau memulai dengan menggunakan siwak."

140.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to listen to poetry, she said: "Rather, it was the most disliked speech to him."
140.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mendengarkan syair, ia berkata: "Justru itu adalah ucapan yang paling dibenci oleh beliau."

141.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ loved comprehensive supplications and would leave whatever came between them.
141.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menyukai doa-doa yang komprehensif dan meninggalkan apa pun yang berada di antara keduanya.

142.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "The Messenger of Allah ﷺ would fast until we said he would never break his fast, and he would break his fast until we said he would never fast. And he used to recite every night Surah Bani Isra'il and Surah al-Zumar."
142.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Rasulullah ﷺ berpuasa hingga kami berkata beliau tidak akan pernah berbuka, dan beliau berbuka hingga kami berkata beliau tidak akan pernah berpuasa. Dan beliau biasa membaca setiap malam Surah Bani Isra'il dan Surah az-Zumar."

143.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "Whenever the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was given a choice between two matters, he always chose the easier of the two, unless it involved sin — in which case he was the furthest of people from it."
143.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Setiap kali Rasulullah ﷺ diberikan pilihan antara dua hal, beliau selalu memilih yang lebih mudah dari keduanya, kecuali jika melibatkan dosa — dalam hal itu beliau adalah yang paling jauh dari orang-orang dari itu."

144.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ never fasted more in any month than in Sha'ban — he used to fast all of Sha'ban. He also said: "Take on of deeds only what you are able to sustain."
144.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ tidak pernah berpuasa lebih banyak dalam bulan mana pun daripada di Sya'ban — beliau biasa berpuasa seluruh bulan Sya'ban. Beliau juga bersabda: "Ambillah dari amalan-amalan hanya yang mampu kalian pertahankan."

145.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the night prayer of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She said: "He would pray thirteen rak'ahs — eight rak'ahs, then Witr, then two rak'ahs while sitting, in which when he wanted to bow he would stand up and bow. Then he would pray two rak'ahs between the two adhans of Fajr."
145.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya tentang shalat malam Rasulullah ﷺ. Ia berkata: "Beliau shalat tiga belas rakaat — delapan rakaat, kemudian Witir, kemudian dua rakaat dalam keadaan duduk, yang ketika beliau ingin ruku beliau berdiri dan ruku. Kemudian beliau shalat dua rakaat antara dua adzan Subuh."

146.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, Safiyyah is a woman..." and gestured with her hand as if meaning she was short. He said: "You have mixed in a word that, if it were mixed into the sea, would taint it."
146.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, Shafiyyah adalah seorang wanita..." dan mengisyaratkan dengan tangannya seolah-olah maksudnya ia pendek. Beliau bersabda: "Kamu telah mencampurkan suatu kata yang jika dicampurkan ke dalam air laut, akan mencemarinya."

147.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray with her lying across in front of him.
147.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara ia berbaring melintang di depannya.

148.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to designate any specific days. She said: "No, his deeds were continuous and consistent. And which of you could sustain what the Prophet ﷺ could sustain?"
148.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ biasa memilih hari-hari tertentu. Ia berkata: "Tidak, amalannya berkelanjutan dan konsisten. Dan siapa di antara kalian yang mampu menanggung apa yang bisa ditanggung Nabi ﷺ?"

149.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "When the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was with me while I was menstruating, he would command me to tie on my lower garment and he would then be intimate with me. He and I also used to bathe from a single vessel when we were both in a state of ritual impurity. And he used to lean his head out to me while in i'tikaf for me to wash it, while I was menstruating."
149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Ketika Rasulullah ﷺ bersamaku sementara aku haid, beliau memerintahkanku untuk mengikat kain bawahku dan kemudian beliau bercumbu denganku. Beliau dan aku juga biasa mandi dari satu wadah ketika kami berdua dalam keadaan junub. Dan beliau biasa mengeluarkan kepalanya kepadaku sementara dalam i'tikaf agar aku bisa mencucinya, sementara aku sedang haid."

150.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: "O Messenger of Allah, I want to buy Barirah — should I stipulate that they keep the wala?" He said: "Buy her, for wala belongs only to the patron or to the one who emancipates."
150.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: "Wahai Rasulullah, aku ingin membeli Barirah — haruskah aku mensyaratkan bahwa mereka mempertahankan wala?" Beliau bersabda: "Belilah, karena wala hanya milik pelindung atau orang yang memerdekakan."
